Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/biology/tinker/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.32
diff -u -r1.32 Makefile
--- Makefile	20 Apr 2007 08:03:12 -0000	1.32
+++ Makefile	20 Apr 2007 17:16:55 -0000
@@ -9,7 +9,9 @@
 PORTVERSION=	4.2.20040908
 PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	biology
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://dasher.wustl.edu/pub/
+MASTER_SITES=	ftp://dasher.wustl.edu/pub/ \
+		${MASTER_SITE_GENTOO}
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	distfiles
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}
 DIST_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 
@@ -17,8 +19,6 @@
 COMMENT=	A general purpose molecular modelling package
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	imake:${X_IMAKE_PORT}
-
-BROKEN=		Unfetchable
 
 MAKE_ENV+=	HAVE_G2C=yes INSTALL_PROGRAM="${INSTALL_PROGRAM}"
